data.intent: Turn the Arcade mockup into the real Carter's Arcade: Vite + vanilla TS static MPA with 12 playable games (6 hub cartridges, 6 cabinets) on the click-to-wake cartridge model, deployed on Vercel at arcade.cartercripe.com
Scaffold, shared runtime (hub/cartridge, storage, audio, input, loop, screen), styles, sprite pipeline, card/cabinet scaffolds, Vercel deploy config
